title: Commuter Pro 500 — Urban Electric Bike
description: The Commuter Pro 500 is the ultimate urban electric bike. With a 500W brushless motor, 50-mile range, and lightweight aluminum frame, it's built to transform your daily commute. Cruise at 20 mph with pedal-assist or twist the throttle for full electric mode.
details: 20 mph top speed with pedal assist

title: Trail Blazer Elite — Mountain E-Bike
description: Conquer any trail with the Trail Blazer Elite. Featuring a 750W mid-drive motor, full suspension, and fat tires, this e-MTB delivers unstoppable performance. 60-mile range and advanced torque sensing give you the power and control to tackle the toughest terrain.
details: 27.5" x 2.8" fat tires for all-terrain grip
Torque sensor for natural ride feel

title: Fold Commute X1 — Portable E-Bike
description: The Fold Commute X1 folds in 15 seconds and fits under your desk, in a car trunk, or on public transit. Don't let its size fool you — the 350W motor delivers a peppy 18 mph, and the 35-mile range makes it a true car replacement for city dwellers.
details: Folds to 28" x 22" x 14" in 15 seconds

title: Cargo Hauler Pro — Family Electric Cargo Bike
description: Haul groceries, kids, or gear with ease. The Cargo Hauler Pro features an extended rear rack rated for 400 lbs, a powerful 750W motor, and dual-battery capability for up to 80 miles of range. The ultimate car replacement for families.
details: Dual battery ready: up to 80 mile range
Extended rear rack with passenger kit
Integrated front basket and running boards

title: Speedster Sport — Performance Road E-Bike
description: For riders who want speed and style. The Speedster Sport combines road bike agility with a 500W motor for effortless cruising at 28 mph. The hidden battery design keeps the sleek look while delivering a 45-mile range.

title: Fat Tire Explorer — All-Terrain E-Bike
description: Sand, snow, trails, or pavement — the Fat Tire Explorer handles it all. With massive 4" tires, a 750W motor, and full suspension, there's no terrain too extreme. 55-mile range for all-day adventures.
details: 4" wide fat tires for any surface

title: Smart Helmet with LED Turn Signals
description: Ride safer and smarter. This premium helmet features integrated LED turn signals controlled by a wireless handlebar remote, MIPS protection, and a magnetic visor. USB-C rechargeable with 10-hour battery life.
details: Wireless LED turn signals & brake light

title: E-Bike Security Bundle
description: Protect your investment. This bundle includes a heavy-duty folding lock (sold secure silver rated), a motion-sensing 120dB disc brake alarm, and a concealed GPS tracker with 30-day battery life.
details: Premium folding lock — Sold Secure Silver rated
